title: TritonParse Launch Diff Event
description: Generated once per kernel during processing. Summarizes what is the same and what varies across all launches of a given kernel.

hash.description: Kernel hash identifying the compiled kernel.

total_launches.description: Number of launches for this kernel.

occurrence_id.description: Global ordering index across all events.

launch_index_map.description: Ranges mapping launches to file line indices.

sames.description: Fields with identical values across all launches.

diffs.description: Fields that vary across launches. Most values are DiffEntry objects ('summary' or 'distribution'). The 'extracted_args' key is special: it maps argument names to DiffEntry objects with diff_type 'argument_diff'.

extracted_args.description: Per-argument diffs, keyed by argument name. Each value is a DiffEntry with diff_type 'argument_diff'.

IndexRange.description: A range of line indices in the output file.

DiffEntry.description: A field that varies across launches.

diff_type.description: Type of diff: 'summary' for volatile fields, 'distribution' for value distributions, 'argument_diff' for per-argument diffs.

sames.description: Fields with identical values across all launches (for 'argument_diff' diff_type).

diffs.description: Fields that vary across launches (for 'argument_diff' diff_type).

ValueDistribution.description: A unique value and its occurrence count across launches.

count.description: Number of launches with this value.

launches.description: Ranges of launch indices that had this value.
